sys_update_set.description: Update Set containing the custom table schema for SynkNode events.
sys_update_set.name: SynkNode Custom Table x_synknode_events

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_x_synknode_events_transfer_duration_ms
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE" element="transfer_duration_ms" table="x_synknode_events"> <sys_id>72e6271020c4462cb8d9880e6f60496c</sys_id> <sys_scope display_value="x_synknode">26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_x_synknode_events_transfer_duration_ms</sys_update_name> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <attributes/> <audit>false</audit> <calculation/> <choice/> <choice_field/> <choice_table/> <column_label>Transfer Duration MS</column_label> <default_value/> <dependent/> <dependent_on_field/> <display>false</display> <dynamic_creation/> <dynamic_creation_script/> <dynamic_ref_qual/> <element>transfer_duration_ms</element> <element_reference>false</element_reference> <formula/> <function_definition/> <function_field>false</function_field> <internal_type>integer</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>40</max_length> <name>x_synknode_events</name> <primary>false</primary> <read_only>false</read_only> <read_only_option/> <reference/> <reference_cascade_rule/> <reference_floats/> <reference_key/> <reference_qual/> <spell_check>false</spell_check> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <text_index>false</text_index> <unique>false</unique> <use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field> <use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier> <virtual/> <virtual_type>script</virtual_type> <widget/> <xml_view>false</xml_view> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>
